_comment: CLI backend bindings for the runtime eval harness. Copy to cli.json to customise (cli.json is gitignored). Each variant is selected with `--backend cli:<variant>`. The runner writes the role system prompt to {{system_prompt_file}} and the user message (JSON.stringify({prompt, context})) to {{user_message_file}}, spawns cmd, captures stdout, parses it as JSON, and extract_path (dotted, or null for raw JSON on stdout) selects the model's role-output JSON string. The backend then parses that string as the role contract and reads .narration.

claude.description: One-shot Claude CLI call. Outputs the Claude Code JSON envelope; extract_path 'result' selects the model text, which must be the role JSON.

openai.description: One-shot OpenAI CLI call. Wrapper must emit the role JSON directly on stdout (extract_path null). Requires the `openai` CLI on PATH and OPENAI_API_KEY.

stub.description: Deterministic local stub — no model call. Emits a fixed, age-appropriate role JSON so the prompt-build -> CLI -> parse -> transcript wiring can be tested offline.
